title: Origins: Synthomorph
description: A shapeshifting-themed Origin for the Origins mod. A Synthomorph is an oddity born with an incomplete genetic structure.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wPUjBYm47-A" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**This data pack is designed for the Origins mod and requires Eggolib. While Pehkui is not mandatory, it is highly recommended.**

**Synthomorph:** A Synthomorph is an oddity born with an incomplete genetic structure, making it reliant on integrating DNA from other lifeforms to temporarily enhance its form and maintain its well-being.

**Impact:** 🔴🔴🔴

**🟢 Acclimated:** The ongoing process of near-constant self-decomposition within your body has yielded a remarkable immunity, rendering you highly resistant to the toxic effects of poisons as well as withering that might otherwise harm others.

**🟢 Adaptive Carapace:** Each discovered synthesized form weaves an additional layer of natural armor into your being, enhancing your defenses with every new genetic integration.

**🟢 Genetic Echo:** Repetitive incorporation of DNA into your own has left lasting imprints in your genetic makeup. These imprints have resulted in a reduced need for food consumption.

**🟢 Momentary Cocoon:** For a brief period after successful DNA synthesis, incoming damage is reduced.

**🟨 Synthesize [Primary]:** Integrate the DNA from mobs into your own genetic makeup, granting a temporary upgrade to a completed form. Ensure that the DNA samples are sourced from mob drops containing viable genetic material. It's important to note that certain drops, like iron, would be ineffective for this purpose. Heat exposure during cooking degrades a DNA sample, making it unusable.

**🟡 Enigmatic Translucence:** In your incomplete form, you manifest as semi-translucent, revealing numerous voids within your being.

**🟡 Mini Morphling:** When in your base form, your size is significantly smaller than that of most creatures.

**🔴 Absolute Focus:** Integrating DNA into your own requires a high level of skill and focus. During the process, you zone out the world around you, dedicating your attention solely to the intricate task of combining the delicate genetic material.

**🔴 Decomposition:** The DNA you splice into your own, sourced from deceased creatures, naturally undergoes decomposition. As a result, you revert back to your weaker base form after a certain period. Notably, exerting yourself appears to accelerate this decomposition.

**🔴 Genetic Insufficiency:** Your genetic structure is inherently unstable when it's not integrated with the DNA of another lifeform. Prolonged existence in this incomplete state gradually weakens and confuses you, eventually reaching a point where it becomes life-threatening.

**🔴 Reversion Fatigue:** After the decomposition process has taken its toll, a phase known as Reversion Fatigue sets in. During this period, you are rendered incapable of synthesizing any genetic modifications.

**🔴 Shifting Form:** Due to the frequent alteration of your physical form, wearing armor or an elytra is an impossibility.

<details>
<summary>Synthesized Forms</summary>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/RU2xJpNre_s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Blaze:

**Item Used:** Blaze Rod.

**🟩 Engulfed in Embers [Secondary]:** Embrace your fiery aura, burning up those around you and your synthesized material.

**🟢 Heat Invulnerability:** Resilience against fire and lava, impervious to their damaging effects.

**🟢 Infernal Flight:** Propel yourself through the air with fiery thrusts, hastening the breakdown of synthesized elements.

**🟡 Average Stature:** When in this form, you are the size of a normal player.

**🟡 Blazing Hue:** In this form, your body radiates an orange glow.

**🟡 Trailing Embers:** Emit a fiery aura harmless to nearby entities.

**🔴 Feared:** Villagers recoil in fear, refusing to engage in trade with you while in this form.

**🔴 Water Vulnerability:** Suffer damage upon contact with water, a weakness amidst your fiery prowess.

### Chicken:

**Items Used:** Feather, Egg, or Raw Chicken.

**🟩 Feathered Gale [Secondary]:** Unleash a flurry of wing beats, damaging and repelling nearby foes with gusts of wind.

**🟢 Lightweight:** Swift movement and reduced impact from falls characterize this form.

**🟡 Compact Frame:** When in this form, you are smaller than the size of a normal player.

**🟡 Snowy Plumage:** Adorned in pristine white feathers in this transformation.

**🔴 Fragile:** Vulnerable to damage as you have reduced health in this form.

### Cow:

**Items Used:** Leather or Raw Beef.

**🟩 Bull Rush [Secondary]:** Dash ahead with force, inflicting damage and pushing back adversaries in your path.

**🟢 Thick Hide:** Boast a durable leather coat, mitigating the impact of incoming damage by increasing your maximum health.

**🟡 Bigger Build:** When in this form, you are slightly larger than the size of a normal player.

**🟡 Earthy Brown:** Cloaked in a rich, brown hue in this bovine guise.

**🔴 Sluggish Stride:** Experience reduced mobility, moving at a slower pace compared to other creatures.

### Creeper:

**Item Used:** Gunpowder.

**🟩 Detonate [Secondary]:** Trigger an explosive blast, damaging nearby foes within range.

**🟢 Stealthy Camouflage:** Blend into your surroundings when sneaking, rendering you invisible to enemies.

**🟡 Average Stature:** When in this form, you are the size of a normal player.

**🟡 Verdant Green:** Become adorned in a vibrant green leafage while transformed into a creeper.

**🔴 Feared:** Villagers recoil in fear, refusing to engage in trade with you while in this form.

**🔴 Highly Flammable:** Prone to ignition and increased damage from fire, posing a significant risk in fiery environments.

### Ender Dragon:

**Item Used:** Dragon’s Breath.

**🟩 Sonic Soar [Secondary]:** Propel forward with astonishing speed while airborne, effortlessly bypassing obstacles and foes.

**🟢 Resilient Endurance:** Bolster your health with additional vitality, fortifying your draconic form.

**🟢 Winged Ascendance:** Sprout majestic wings akin to an elytra, granting the ability of flight.

**🟡 Massive Stature:** Assume a slightly larger size than the average player when transformed into the formidable Ender Dragon.

**🟡 Violet Majesty:** Cloaked in a regal purple hue while embodying the Ender Dragon.

**🔴 Feared:** Villagers recoil in fear, refusing to engage in trade with you while in this form.

**🔴 Susceptible to Explosions:** Endure heightened damage from explosive assaults in this formidable form.

### Enderman:

**Item Used:** Ender Pearl.

**🟩 Glimpse Shift [Secondary]:** Instantly teleport to the targeted location within your line of sight, utilizing the power of the End.

**🟢 Ender Glare:** Lock eyes with entities to momentarily freeze them in place, harnessing the mesmerizing power of the Enderman's gaze.
Would obviously have a cooldown per mob, probably done using tags

**🟡 Dragon’s Tint:** Radiate a mysterious purple aura, reflecting the essence of the End’s Beast.

**🟡 Towering Stature:** Assume a slightly larger size than the average player when transformed into the elusive Enderman.

**🔴 Feared:** Villagers recoil in fear, refusing to engage in trade with you while in this form.

**🔴 Vulnerable to Water:** Experience discomfort and damage upon contact with water, a weakness amidst your otherworldly abilities.

### Ghast:

**Item Used:** Ghast Tear.

**🟩 Infernal Volley [Secondary]:** Unleash a fiery fireball, launching it towards your target with explosive force.

**🟢 Ethereal Flight:** Take to the skies, hastening the natural decomposition process as you soar.

**🟡 Massive Stature:** Tower over others with a form slightly larger than the average player while embodying the intimidating form of the Ghast.

**🟡 Pale Complexion:** Cloaked in a ghostly white hue, marking your presence with an otherworldly aura.

**🔴 Aerial Vulnerability:** Endure heightened damage while airborne, a weakness exposed amidst your lofty flights.

**🔴 Feared:** Villagers recoil in fear, refusing to engage in trade with you while in this form.

### Glow Squid:

**Item Used:** Glow Ink Sacs.

**🟩 Cloud of Clarity [Secondary]:** Release an ink cloud giving nearby entities night vision and glowing.

**🟢 Aquatic Adept:** Enhanced movement speed when wet.

**🟡 Average Stature:** When in this form, you are the size of a normal player.

**🟡 Azure Hue:** Adorned in a striking blue coloration, reminiscent of the ocean.

**🔴 Vulnerable to Dehydration:** Experience lowered health when deprived of moisture.

### Goat:

**Item Used:** Goat Horn.

**🟩 Ramming Charge [Secondary]:** Charge ahead, delivering a powerful blow to enemies, causing damage and knocking them back.

**🟢 Alpine Agility:** Scale heights with ease, boasting enhanced jumping capabilities suited for mountainous terrain.

**🟡 Average Stature:** When in this form, you are the size of a normal player.

**🟡 Snowy Pelt:** Cloaked in a pristine white coat, blending seamlessly with wintry landscapes.

**🔴 Sluggish Stride:** Experience reduced mobility, moving at a slower pace compared to other creatures.

### Magma Cube:

**Item Used:** Magma Cream.

**🟩 Infernal Vault [Secondary]:** Execute a mighty leap in your intended direction, propelled by the fiery energy within.

**🟢 Heat Invulnerability:** Resilience against fire and lava, impervious to their damaging effects.

**🟢 Resilient Reformation:** Upon demise, revert to your base form with a single heart and enhanced swiftness, ready to bounce back into action.

**🟢 Squishy Landing:** Absorb impacts with ease, suffering minimal harm from falls due to your pliable form.

**🟡 Average Stature:** When in this form, you are the size of a normal player.

**🟡 Ember Glow:** Radiate an intense orange-red hue, reminiscent of smoldering embers.

**🔴 Feared:** Villagers recoil in fear, refusing to engage in trade with you while in this form.

**🔴 Water Vulnerability:** Suffer damage upon contact with water, a weakness amidst your fiery prowess.

### Phantom:

**Item Used:** Phantom Membrane.

**🟩 Phantom Dash [Secondary]:** Swiftly propel yourself forward while airborne with a sudden burst of speed.

**🟢 Aerial Dominance:** Unleash heightened damage upon your foes while soaring through the skies, asserting your superiority from above.

**🟢 Winged:** Equip yourself with the graceful wings of an elytra, granting the gift of flight.

**🟡 Compact Frame:** When in this form, you are smaller than the size of a normal player.

**🟡 Azure Tinge:** Radiate a cool, calming blue hue, embodying the ethereal essence of the Phantom.

**🔴 Feared:** Villagers recoil in fear, refusing to engage in trade with you while in this form.

**🔴 Vulnerable to Daylight:** Suffer under the harsh rays of daylight, enduring burning sensations when exposed.

### Pig:

**Item Used:** Raw Porkchop.

**🟩 Truffle Snout [Secondary]:** Utilize your sharp sense of smell to enhance your Foraging ability temporarily, improving your chances of uncovering resources.

**🟢 Resourceful Foraging:** Uncover a variety of food items, including carrots, potatoes, or mushrooms, while engaged in mining activities.

**🟡 Average Stature:** When in this form, you are the size of a normal player.

**🟡 Pigment:** Adorned in a charming pink pigment, reflecting the cheerful nature of the Pig.

**🔴 Timid Combatant:** Engage in combat with a reserved approach, dealing reduced damage and enduring heightened vulnerability to enemy attacks.

### Pufferfish:

**Item Used:** Pufferfish.

**🟩 Toxic Inflation [Secondary]:** Expand your form, inflicting damage and afflicting nearby adversaries with the effects of Poisonous Defense.

**🟢 Aquatic Adept:** Enhanced movement speed when wet.

**🟢 Poisonous Defense:** Retaliate against attackers by afflicting them with nausea and poison upon striking you.

**🟡 Compact Frame:** When in this form, you are smaller than the size of a normal player.

**🟡 Golden Hue:** Adorned in a vibrant yellow shade, reflecting the vivid essence of the Pufferfish.

**🔴 Vulnerable to Dehydration:** Experience lowered health when deprived of moisture.

### Rabbit:

**Items Used:** Rabbit Hide, Raw Rabbit, or Rabbit’s Foot.

**🟩 Burrow Burst [Secondary]:** Temporarily enhances your mining speed, facilitating swift resource gathering.

**🟢 Burrower:** Possess the ability to tunnel through dirt and similar substances.

**🟢 Nimble Hopper:** Enjoy heightened jump capability and swifter movement, bounding through your surroundings with ease.

**🟡 Compact Frame:** When in this form, you are smaller than the size of a normal player.

**🔴 Delicate Constitution:** Endure reduced maximum health, requiring cautious navigation of hazards and foes.

### Sheep:

**Items Used:** Any Wool or Raw Mutton.

**🟩 Grazing Revitalize [Secondary]:** Restore health by consuming nearby grass, replenishing your health.

**🟢 Wooly Padding:** Benefit from thick woolen padding, increasing your maximum health.

**🟡 Average Stature:** When in this form, you are the size of a normal player.

**🟡 Snowy Fleece:** Wrapped in a soft white coat, embodying the purity of the Sheep.

**🔴 Dampened Stride:** Experience decreased movement speed when soaked, navigating wet environments with reduced agility.

**🔴 Gentle Disposition:** Inflict reduced attack damage, reflecting your passive nature.

**🔴 Highly Flammable:** Prone to ignition and increased damage from fire, posing a significant risk in fiery environments.

### Shulker:

**Item Used:** Shulker Shell.

**🟩 Glimpse Shift [Secondary]:** Instantly teleport to the targeted location within your line of sight, utilizing the power of the End.

**🟢 Levitation Strike:** Inflict levitation upon entities when you attack them, disrupting their movements and positioning.

**🟢 Resilient Shell:** Bolster your defenses, increasing your maximum health.

**🟡 Compact Frame:** When in this form, you are smaller than the size of a normal player.

**🟡 Purpur Glow:** Emit a mesmerizing purple-pink aura, resonating with the enigmatic essence of the Shulker.

**🔴 Feared:** Villagers recoil in fear, refusing to engage in trade with you while in this form.

**🔴 Sluggish Stride:** Experience reduced mobility, moving at a slower pace compared to other creatures.

### Skeleton:

**Item Used:** Bones.

**🟩 Arrow Volley [Secondary]:** Unleash a rapid barrage of arrows, overwhelming your enemies with a deadly hail.

**🟢 Sharpshooter:** Excel with bows and crossbows, dealing increased damage with these ranged weapons.

**🟡 Average Stature:** When in this form, you are the size of a normal player.

**🟡 Bone White:** Cloaked in a stark white hue, reflecting the skeletal form.

**🔴 Brittle Bones:** Endure reduced maximum health, an effect of your frail bones.

**🔴 Feared:** Villagers recoil in fear, refusing to engage in trade with you while in this form.

**🔴 Vulnerable to Daylight:** Suffer under the harsh rays of daylight, enduring burning sensations when exposed.

### Slime:

**Item Used:** Slimeball.

**🟩 Slimy Surge [Secondary]:** Execute a mighty leap in the direction you're looking, propelling yourself with great force.

**🟢 Resilient Reformation:** Upon demise, revert to your base form with a single heart and enhanced swiftness, ready to bounce back into action.

**🟢 Squishy Landing:** Absorb impacts with ease, suffering minimal harm from falls due to your pliable form.

**🟡 Average Stature:** When in this form, you are the size of a normal player.

**🟡 Translucent Green:** Take on a slightly transparent green appearance.

**🔴 Feared:** Villagers recoil in fear, refusing to engage in trade with you while in this form.

### Sniffer:

**Item Used:** Sniffer Egg.

**🟩 Ancient Snout [Secondary]:** Utilize your exceptional sense of smell to enhance your Advanced Forager ability, temporarily increasing the chances of finding resources while foraging and allowing the discovery of valuables.

**🟢 Advanced Forager:** Enjoy a high probability of discovering food items such as carrots, potatoes, and mushrooms while mining.

**🟡 Larger Build:** Assume a size slightly larger than the average player, reflecting the form of the Sniffer.

**🟡 Lively Green:** Become adorned in a vibrant green, reminiscent of foliage.

**🔴 Sluggish Stride:** Experience reduced mobility, moving at a slower pace compared to other creatures.

**🔴 Timid Combatant:** Engage in combat with a reserved approach, dealing reduced damage and enduring heightened vulnerability to enemy attacks.

### Spider:

**Item Used:** String or Spider Eye.

**🟩 Spider’s Web [Secondary]:** Launch a sticky web projectile to entangle and immobilize enemies.

**🟢 Venomous Bite:** Inflict poison on enemies with each hit.

**🟢 Wall Climber:** Gain the ability to scale vertical surfaces effortlessly.

**🟡 Average Stature:** When in this form, you are the size of a normal player.

**🟡 Shadowy Silk:** Adorned in a darkened, shadowy hue, reflecting the sinister nature of the Spider.

**🔴 Feared:** Villagers recoil in fear, refusing to engage in trade with you while in this form.

**🔴 Frail Frame:** Endure reduced maximum health, making you more vulnerable to attacks.

### Squid: 

**Item Used:** Ink Sacs.

**🟩 Cloud of Blindness [Secondary]:** Release an ink cloud that inflicts blindness on nearby entities.

**🟢 Aquatic Adept:** Enhanced movement speed when wet.

**🟡 Average Stature:** When in this form, you are the size of a normal player.

**🟡 Midnight Blue:** Cloaked in a dark blue hue, reflecting the depths of the ocean.

**🔴 Vulnerable to Dehydration:** Experience lowered health when deprived of moisture.

### Turtle:

**Item Used:** Turtle Scute.

**🟩 Shell Shield [Secondary]:** Withdraw into your shell, blocking all incoming damage while losing the ability to move.

**🟢 Aquatic Adept:** Enhanced movement speed when wet.

**🟢 Shell Defense:** Benefit from increased health due to your protective shell.

**🟡 Average Stature:** When in this form, you are the size of a normal player.

**🟡 Emerald Green:** Cloaked in a rich emerald green hue, reflecting the natural beauty of the Turtle.

**🔴 Sluggish Stride:** Experience reduced mobility, moving at a slower pace compared to other creatures.

### Wither:

**Item Used:** Nether Star.

**🟩 Withering Skull [Secondary]:** Launch a deadly wither skull, dealing area damage to enemies in its path.

**🟢 Ethereal Flight:** Gain the ability to fly, accelerating the decomposition process, and shortening your time in this form.

**🟢 Master of the Dead:** Command respect from undead creatures, except other Withers, making them passive towards you while in this form.

**🟢 Soul Devourer:** Gain temporary strength and regeneration upon defeating an enemy, fueled by the souls you consume.

**🟢 Unyielding Endurance:** Increase your maximum health, enhancing your durability and resilience in battle.

**🟢 Withering Touch:** Inflict entities with the wither effect upon striking them, weakening their vitality over time.

**🟡 Menacing Build:** Grow slightly larger than the average player, imposing a more intimidating presence.

**🟡 Necrotic Aura:** Emit a storm of withering particulates, causing continuous damage to nearby entities over time.

**🟡 Shadowed Form:** In this form, your body is darkened, reflecting the sinister nature of the Wither.

**🔴 Corrupting Presence:** Nearby blocks decay over time, transforming nearby terrain into Netherrack, Soul Sand, etc.

**🔴 Feared:** Villagers are scared of you in this form, even if you can get to them before they wither away, they will refuse to trade.

**🔴 Wither's Toll:** After reverting to your base form, experience a period of significant weakness and vulnerability, leaving you highly susceptible.

### Wither Skeleton:

**Item Used:** Wither Skeleton Skull.

**🟩 Withering Skull [Secondary]:** Unleash a devastating wither skull, causing area damage and utilizing remaining genetic material.

**🟢 Shadowed Movement:** Enhance your agility and speed, allowing for swift and elusive maneuvers in combat.

**🟢 Withering Touch:** Inflict entities with the wither effect upon striking them, weakening their vitality over time.

**🟡 Bigger Build:** When in this form, you are slightly larger than the size of a normal player.

**🟡 Lesser Shadow:** In this form, your body is darkened, resembling the ominous appearance of the greater Wither.

**🔴 Brittle Bones:** Endure reduced maximum health, an effect of your frail bones.

**🔴 Feared:** Villagers recoil in fear, refusing to engage in trade with you while in this form.

### Zombie:

**Item Used:** Rotten Flesh.

**🟩 Sickening Grasp [Secondary]:** Snatch and hold onto a target, draining their life force over time and leaving them slowed in your grasp.

**🟢 Feast:** Consuming raw meat restores health.

**🟡 Average Stature:** When in this form, you are the size of a normal player.

**🟡 Putrid Flesh:** Greenish hue to your skin, reflecting your undead nature.

**🔴 Decayed Mobility:** Experience reduced movement speed, hindered by the decay that plagues your undead form.

**🔴 Feared:** Villagers recoil in fear, refusing to engage in trade with you while in this form.

**🔴 Vulnerable to Daylight:** Suffer under the harsh rays of daylight, enduring burning sensations when exposed.

</details>
